what_it_is: A proposal to treat AI fluency as a repeatable reasoning practice, not just familiarity with current tools.
why_it_matters: If students build judgment under changing tools and norms, they can adapt faster and use AI responsibly over time.
evidence: The SMU article shows both gains from personalization and risks around privacy, equity, and implementation, supporting a model that pairs AI use with structured human reasoning habits.
next_step: Pilot a small cohort workflow with source-plus-note intake and evaluate improvement in claim/value/difference clarity after guided refinement rounds.
